title: Uzbekistan's Possible Lineup to Face DR Congo at the FIFA World Cup 2026
original_text:
The Uzbekistan national team enters its final group-stage match at the 2026 FIFA World Cup needing three points against DR Congo to keep its slim qualification hopes alive.

Fabio Cannavaro's side has yet to pick up a point in the tournament after defeats to Colombia and Portugal , meaning only a victory would leave the Asian side with a mathematical chance of advancing as one of the best third-placed teams.

Even with a win, Uzbekistan would still need favorable results elsewhere to extend its World Cup journey.

Despite the results, Fabio Cannavaro has publicly defended his squad's effort after the heavy loss to Portugal.

The Italian coach acknowledged the level of opposition in the group and highlighted that his players continued competing even during the most difficult stretches of the match.

Now, he will hope for a stronger response against DR Congo as Uzbekistan looks to leave the tournament with a more positive final impression.

Cannavaro is expected to rely on the core group he has used throughout the World Cup.

With no margin for error left, Uzbekistan will try to close the group stage with a victory that keeps its mathematical chances alive.

The attacking leadership of Eldor Shomurodov and the creativity of Abbosbek Fayzullaev will be key against a DR Congo defense that has shown resilience throughout the tournament.

With pride on the line and qualification still technically possible, Uzbekistan will aim to deliver a performance that reflects the growth of its football on the world stage.

Match Information

Match: Uzbekistan vs DR Congo
Competition: FIFA World Cup 2026 – Group K
Date: June 27, 2026
Venue: Mercedes-Benz Stadium
City: Atlanta, United States
Head Coach: Fabio Cannavaro
Captain: Eldor Shomurodov

Follow all the action from the 2026 FIFA World Cup on beIN SPORTS.
